name: Yang Chow Eggplant in Hot Spicy Garlic Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat about 1/2 cup vegetable oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the eggplant pieces and fry for 2 to 3 minutes until golden brown.
3. Remove the eggplant from the pan and drain on paper towels.
4. In a wok, combine 1 teaspoon of vegetable oil, ginger, and garlic. Heat until hot.
5. Add pork, bamboo shoots, cooking wine, chicken broth, soy sauce, sugar, vinegar, and chile oil to taste. Stir until the sauce begins to boil.
6. Add the eggplant back into the wok and toss to coat well. Continue cooking for 30 seconds longer.
7. Mix cornstarch with water to make a paste. Stir this into the sauce mixture and cook for 30 seconds more.
8. Turn off the heat.
9. Add minced green onions and sesame oil, stirring once.
10. Serve as main course for 2 people or appetizer servings for 3 to 4 people.
